name: MCKESSON CORP
summary: McKesson Corporation, tracing roots to 1833, is a diversified healthcare services company operating four segments: U.S. Pharmaceutical (distribution of branded, generic, specialty, biosimilar, and OTC drugs), Prescription Technology Solutions (medication access and affordability technology), Medical-Surgical Solutions (supply distribution to healthcare providers offering 245,000+ products), and International (distribution and retail pharmacy services in Canada and Norway). McKesson serves pharmacies, hospitals, oncology practices, biopharma companies, and governments.

products.name: McKesson Connect
products.description: Internet-based ordering system providing real-time inventory availability, ordering, purchasing, third-party reconciliation, and account management.

products.name: Central Fill
products.description: Prescription refill service enabling pharmacies to remotely refill prescriptions faster, accurately, and at lower cost.

products.name: Health Mart
products.description: National franchise network of ~4,400 independently-owned pharmacies offering business operations, marketing, and audit support solutions.

products.name: Health Mart Atlas
products.description: Managed care services connecting community pharmacies, health systems, and physician practices to competitive reimbursement rates.

products.name: McKesson Reimbursement Advantage (MRA)
products.description: Reimbursement optimization package including financial services, analytic services, and customer care for pharmacies.

products.name: McKesson Provider Pay
products.description: Automated reconciliation and payment management solution to maximize third-party cash flow and pursue unpaid claims.

products.name: McKesson OneStop Generics
products.description: Generic pharmaceutical purchasing program offering broad drug selection and competitive pricing for pharmacies.

products.name: McKesson SynerGx
products.description: Generic pharmaceutical purchasing and inventory management program to maximize cost savings for retail national accounts.

products.name: ExpressRx Track
products.description: Pharmacy automation solution featuring robotics, upgraded imaging, and expanded vial capabilities for speed and accuracy.

products.name: Pinpoint Community Solutions
products.description: Perpetual inventory management system for independent pharmacy owners with five or fewer stores.

products.name: FrontEdge
products.description: Strategic planning, merchandising, and price maintenance program to help community pharmacies maximize store profitability.

products.name: McKesson Amplify
products.description: Resources and funding for state pharmacy associations to support advocacy initiatives for independent pharmacies.

products.name: McKesson RxOwnership Program
products.description: Confidential no-fee resource for pharmacists interested in buying, starting, or selling an independent pharmacy.

products.name: Ontada
products.description: Oncology technology and insights business providing software for clinical, financial, and operational needs of oncology practices.

products.name: McKesson Pharmacy Systems
products.description: Innovative software technology supporting retail pharmacies and hospitals in day-to-day operations and compliance.

products.name: MacroHelix
products.description: Software technology and services supporting pharmacy operations and compliance for retail pharmacies and hospitals.

products.name: Supply Logix
products.description: Software technology and services supporting inventory management for retail pharmacies and hospitals.

products.name: Onmark
products.description: Group purchasing organization (GPO) serving oncology and specialty practices with drug distribution and purchasing solutions.

partnerships.description: Joint venture ClarusONE Sourcing Services LLP for sourcing generic pharmaceutical drugs.

partnerships.partner_name: Centers for Disease Control and Prevention (CDC)
partnerships.description: Exclusive distributor relationship for the CDC Vaccines for Children program.
McKesson owns 51% controlling interest in oncology research network enhancing clinical trial access nationwide.
